## Multimedia & Authoring Portfolio Website

This is a professional multimedia portfolio website showcasing rotoscoping and 3D rendering projects.

### Project Structure
- `index.html` - Home page with featured projects
- `portfolio.html` - Detailed project information
- `about.html` - About the creator and skills
- `css/styles.css` - Main stylesheet with dark theme and responsive design
- `images/` - Directory for project images (placeholder for now)

### Key Features
- Modern dark theme with cyan/blue accent colors
- Responsive grid layout
- Smooth navigation and transitions
- Project detail pages with technical information
- Professional footer with copyright information

### Technology Stack
- HTML5
- CSS3 (Grid, Flexbox, animations)
- Vanilla JavaScript (ready for enhancement)

### How to Run
1. Open `index.html` in any modern web browser
2. Or use a local server: `python -m http.server 8000`
3. Navigate to `http://localhost:8000`

### Customization Notes
- Replace placeholder image overlays with actual project images in `images/` folder
- Update project descriptions and details as needed
- Embed YouTube videos by replacing video placeholder divs with iframe embeds
- Modify colors in CSS by updating `:root` variables
